diagrams.title: Polymorphism Types Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the classification of polymorphism in Python
elements: Compile-time (Static) - Method Overloading with default args
diagrams.purpose: Understand the two main categories of polymorphism and their Python implementations

diagrams.title: Method Overriding Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Parent-child class relationship showing method overriding
elements: When animal = Dog(), animal.speak() calls Dog's version (runtime polymorphism)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how method overriding enables runtime polymorphism through inheritance

diagrams.title: ABC and Concrete Classes
diagrams.description: Abstract Base Class Shape with concrete subclasses
elements: ABC: Shape (abstract) with abstract method area()
diagrams.purpose: Understand how ABC enforces implementation contracts in subclasses
